summary: Captured repository responsibility, directory design, and generation pipeline specification for review-author-docs; registered current-state feature and prepared session handoff linkage.

Selected Astro as the primary static HTML generator, defined the upstream-lock schema contract, and split the next implementation-facing work into upstream ingest, diagnostics parity, and source-map/generated-immutability specs.
Pinned GitHub Pages under the irdtechbook account as the default publication target and added a dedicated content-information-architecture phase with a separate spec package.
